title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also referred to as Claude Mythos 5) with benchmarks, capability demonstrations, and comparison to GPT 5.5. The video covers performance across tasks including 3D reconstruction, music composition, ray tracing, chemistry, and medical imaging classification.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5), running benchmarks and capability demonstrations alongside a comparison to GPT 5.5. The demonstrations span 3D reconstruction, music composition, ray tracing, chemistry, and medical imaging classification. The framing centers on benchmarking and model evaluation across these task types, with attention to reasoning model behavior.
